nodes.label: Pipeline Stub Design
nodes.rationale: Stub allows Person 2's API to run independently for testing before the real async pipeline (Person 3) is ready. Separation lets parallel team development proceed without blocking on full pipeline integration.

nodes.label: ClinicalCopilot System
nodes.rationale: Multi-agent AI system built at AGI House x W&B hackathon. Architecture decision: 5 specialized agents run with asyncio parallel fan-out (Medication + Timeline parallel, Risk waits for Medication, Synthesis waits for all 4) to minimize latency. W&B Weave chosen for full auditability of clinical AI decisions.

nodes.label: IngestionAgent
nodes.rationale: Cleans and chunks raw clinical text without using an LLM, keeping preprocessing deterministic and fast.

nodes.label: AgentMessage Shared Contract
nodes.rationale: Every agent input/output uses one typed contract (AgentMessage TypedDict) so team members can build agents independently and integrate reliably. The trace_id field propagates the same UUID4 across all agents in a pipeline run, enabling full Weave trace correlation.

nodes.label: Parallel asyncio Agent Fan-out Pattern
nodes.rationale: Medication and Timeline run in parallel to reduce total pipeline latency. Risk waits for Medication output because drug risk analysis depends on the extracted medication list. Synthesis waits for all four because it merges all outputs into the SOAP note.
